name_en: 🆕 Chip Version.💕 Top Quality Replica M11548 Blue. This cardholder features Brushed Monogram leather with a faded Monogram print and vintage texture, paying homage to the leather used on vintage saddles. It includes card slots, an interior pocket, and a rear exterior pocket. 7.5 x 11.1 x 1 cm (Length x Height x Width)
